entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `originalFilePath` TEXT NOT NULL, `durationMs` INTEGER NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `source` TEXT NOT NULL, `processingStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, `errorMessage` TEXT, `summary` TEXT, `rawTranscript` TEXT, `expirationDate` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `recordingId` TEXT NOT NULL, `text` TEXT NOT NULL, `startMs` INTEGER NOT NULL, `endMs` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sequence` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`recordingId`) REFERENCES `recordings`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_transcript_segments_recordingId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_transcript_segments_recordingId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`recordingId`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `recordingId` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL, `deadline` INTEGER, `isCompleted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sourceTimestampMs` INTEGER, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`recordingId`) REFERENCES `recordings`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_extracted_items_recordingId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_extracted_items_recordingId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`recordingId`)

indices.name: index_extracted_items_type
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_extracted_items_type` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`type`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `apiName` TEXT NOT NULL, `method` TEXT NOT NULL, `url` TEXT NOT NULL, `requestBody` TEXT, `responseCode` INTEGER NOT NULL, `responseBody` TEXT, `durationMs` INTEGER NOT NULL, `errorMessage` TEXT)
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT NOT NULL, `rawTranscript` TEXT NOT NULL, `summary` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`recordings`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_recordings_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `recordings` BEGIN DELETE FROM `recordings_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_recordings_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `recordings` BEGIN DELETE FROM `recordings_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_recordings_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `recordings` BEGIN INSERT INTO `recordings_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `rawTranscript`, `summary`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`rawTranscript`, NEW.`summary`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_recordings_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `recordings` BEGIN INSERT INTO `recordings_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `rawTranscript`, `summary`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`rawTranscript`, NEW.`summary`); END

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`content` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`extracted_items`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_items_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `extracted_items` BEGIN DELETE FROM `items_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_items_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `extracted_items` BEGIN DELETE FROM `items_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_items_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `extracted_items` BEGIN INSERT INTO `items_fts`(`docid`, `content`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`content`); END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_items_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `extracted_items` BEGIN INSERT INTO `items_fts`(`docid`, `content`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`content`); END
